title: DARE
meaning_summary: DARE gives Demon Days a second tracked anchor because it captures the album's dance-pop side and remains one of Gorillaz's most replayable singles.
revenue_drivers: Dance and alternative playlists keep the song active outside ordinary rock catalog listening.
Demon Days album demand connects it directly to Feel Good Inc.
Gorillaz's cross-genre identity supports recurring discovery from pop, electronic, and alternative audiences.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate models Demon Days album halo, dance-playlist utility, and cross-genre catalog demand.

ownership.master_owner: Label / catalog rightsholder with artist-side royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears shared across writers, collaborators, and publisher administration
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog-sale adjustment is modeled
ownership.notes: Modeled annual range, not a public royalty statement.
